title: jasminum suaveolens
intro: Jasminum suaveolens, also known as the star jasmine or night-blooming jasmine, is a flowering plant native to tropical regions of Asia. The medicinal properties of Jasminum suaveolens include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate stress, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality due to its calming properties. Herbal preparations of Jasminum suaveolens can be made into teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used to promote overall well-being and soothe the nervous system.
